questions.question: Convert the decimal number -47 to 8-bit two's complement representation. Show the steps of conversion.
keyPoints: Find binary representation of positive number (00101111)

questions.question: Perform the following binary arithmetic: 101101.011 + 11001.101 (in binary). Show the addition and state if overflow occurs.
keyPoints: Add column by column with carry
No overflow for unsigned; check sign bits for signed arithmetic

questions.question: Explain the IEEE 754 single precision floating-point format. Given the decimal value 5.75, represent it in this format (32-bit).

Explain the difference between big-endian and little-endian byte ordering. For the 32-bit hexadecimal value 0x12345678, show how it would be stored in memory for both schemes (starting at address 1000).
